reviews.review_msg: Rick teaches Bus 484, 482 and 381, if you can take all these classes with this professor, DO SO!  The amount you will learn in his classes will benefit you forever.  Rick is an ivy league professor.  Smart, relaxed, very interested in HR and believes in what he is teaching.  Show interest, attend, & make an effort and you will do well in his class!

Rick is one of the best profs at SFU. He is clearly passionate about HR makes learning really fun and interactive. He has tons of real world experience and shares those stories with the class. Would love to take another class with him. Plus the Aussie accent makes him nice to listen to.
Great professor!  Deeply passionate about H.R. and definitely engages with his entire Seminar!  Would definitely look forward to taking courses with him again!

Excellent prof. Cares deeply about his students and is extremely knowledgeable about the material. A lot of students tend to skip lectures as you can scrape by with just reading the text. I definitely recommend attending lecture, though. Iverson knows how to engage students and hammer points home. Tuts after lec are instructed by him-aim for those.

Great teacher!  Works hard and cares about his students.  He obviously works out a lot.  He might have looked like Tom Cruise in the past, but now he looks a more like Clive Owen.  Not sure about the glasses, though.
Great Prof. Very interactive class. Forces you to pay attention. Loves what he does. One of the best business profs at SFU.

Very engaging lecturer; you can tell he loves what he does. With his lecture style, you'll easily remember the key concepts. Provides a good outline of what's on exams. Always available for help outside of lecture/tutorials. If you're in the tutorials closest to the lecture, he'll likely be your TA as well- rare for a professor of his status.
Very good professor, really enjoys his job and his students.  Prints out the notes for the class - bonus.  Very helpful when you need help and material is easy - great prof

He is very nice and willing to help. Not so much "hot" as "refined" he dresses well and is probably really rich. He definitely knows how to make HR interesting and fun and he DEFINITELY knows what he's talking about.

One of the best profs I've had at SFU, winner of the TD Bank Distinguished Teaching Award. He is very knowledgeable in HR, has a very high interest in course content, and even helps place students in jobs after graduation. Lectures are fairly interesting & interactive.

He will make a judgment about you right away. Go to his office and make sure that he thinks you are a keener because the material is so subjective his grades are often based on what he thinks about you. If you can take something else instead do it, it wasn't worth the money.
He is a delightful prof who looks just like Tom Cruise!  His accent is dreamy but he does go on and on.  And the eating and shelling of the organic peanuts can be distracting.
Excellent prof.. one of the best profs at SFU!!!
Excellent PROF...one of da best business profs at sfu. But need to really know the material in the book in and out to do really well.
How can people leave him a negative feedback.
I would say he is probably the best prof in SFU business, very helpful and nice, hated HR before get in and like HR after 381, take his 381 or your will miss the best part of SFU business
Very enthusiastic! Gotta love the Aussie accent! Great teaching philosophy - high involvement and interaction.

Rick adds no value to the lecture and just repeats the textbook.  I haven't had him as a TA, so maybe he's a better TA than he is a professor.  Or, maybe he's a better prof for higher-level courses... but certainly not for 381.

Just an excellent teacher.  Very easy to talk to, and will go out of his way to help any student.  Class material is quite applicable to the HR industry.  Another note on Rick, he is helping a group of student get ready for an HR case competition in Montreal. How many Profs go that far for students?

Rick is the best, he motivates and keeps everyone interested and is very helpful and supportive. He even gives out his home number for extra help and planned an end of the semester pub lunch for the entire class to celebrate the end of the class. How many profs do that?

Great prof.  One of if not the best at SFU.  One of the reasons i'm in HR.  Easy to talk to if you have problems and will give you his home number if in 400 level courses to call him if you need help. Tests are fair if you know what's going on.  He will try to help you understand.

Lets face it, when were done with university, we wont remember 5 things we learned in the classroom. But we remember awesome professors.  And this gentleman is hands down the best, and i mean best professor you can possibly have.  Very personable, very nice, very enthusistic.  Nuff said.
Rick is the best professor I've ever had! Try to get him as your TA too!
Awesome Professor, one of my two favorites of all time.
Really the best prof at SFU ever!!! Funny and easy to follow, great class!
great prof.. learned a lot and lectures were sometimes long, but he tried hard to make it interesting. exams were okay and fair. recommended if you take 381.

Best prof I've had at SFU and a very great guy. Teaches very well, and exams are easy if you study hard. Also very funny.... You'll have a great time if he is your tutorial leader. Highly recommended.
He's the best prof I've ever had!
great aussie, fun, smart... treat students as friends, not food
Really good guy, enthousiastic, energetic, really gets the students to be interested in the course material.
The best at SFU by far.

He is excellent. Loves to talk and great communicator. Willing to help out anytime and loves conversations. He is intelligent when it comes to his course and would definitely take a course with him again. Australian accent is great. Cute, no Tom Cruise!
Very helpful and seems to really care about his students.  He's cute, but doesnt look like Tom Cruise like everyone says.
A genuinely nice prof, who is also very enthusiastic and energetic throughout his lectures. Would definitely take another course with him.
One of the best prof's I've ever had! Energetic, interested, and really cares. If possible, try to get into his tutorial sections.
Excellent teacher. Really seems to care about the students and is very helpful. would recommend his course.
The most passionate prof. I have ever been taught by. He's the only prof who really cares about how his students are doing in his classes. More profs should take his lead.
He is my fav prof in SFU. He cares about us. He's the best prof in SFU. His exams are reasonable. You can get a good grade, if u really put in effort.
Absolutely a great person! My favourite Prof. at SFU.
No Comments
Rewards good performance, interesting lectures, great personality. Great prof.
he really knows his stuff....
Great prof. He really takes an interest towards the students and the coursework.
What a great guy!  He is so funny and really cares!
Terrific Teacher!  He's the Best!
One of my favorite profs at SFU
He is fantastic- Highest energy prof i've ever had- Loves working and it shows.
Looks a little like Tom Cruise
